headline: Morgan Stanley’s E*Trade Rolls Out Crypto Trading. Wall Street’s Push Into Digital Assets Continues.
summary: Eligible E*Trade customers will be able to purchase crypto assets through a linked account at crypto infrastructure firm zerohash for a fee of 0.5% of assets traded.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley’s E*Trade Rolls Out Crypto Trading. Wall Street’s Push Into Digital Assets Continues.
raw.summary: Eligible E*Trade customers will be able to purchase crypto assets through a linked account at crypto infrastructure firm zerohash for a fee of 0.5% of assets traded.

headline: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's What You Should Know
summary: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

headline: Volatility, Increased Client Activity to Support IBKR's Q2 Earnings
summary: Interactive Brokers' Q2 results may reflect the benefits of higher client trading, rising accounts and stronger net interest income.

headline: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
summary: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.
